custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ShoppingItem.itemId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM ShoppingItem WHERE (ShoppingItem.groupId = ?) AND [$CATEGORY_ID$]

SELECT COUNT(ShoppingCoupon.couponId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM ShoppingCoupon WHERE (ShoppingCoupon.groupId = ?) AND (ShoppingCoupon.companyId = ?) AND ( (ShoppingCoupon.code_ LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingCoupon.active_ = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingCoupon.discountType = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) )

SELECT COUNT(ShoppingOrder.orderId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM ShoppingOrder WHERE (ShoppingOrder.groupId = ?) AND (ShoppingOrder.companyId = ?) AND (ShoppingOrder.userId = ?) AND ( (ShoppingOrder.number_ LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.billingFirstName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.billingLastName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.billingEmailAddress LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.shippingFirstName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.shippingLastName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.shippingEmailAddress LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.ppPaymentStatus = ?) )

SELECT {ShoppingCoupon.*} FROM ShoppingCoupon WHERE (ShoppingCoupon.groupId = ?) AND (ShoppingCoupon.companyId = ?) AND ( (ShoppingCoupon.code_ LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingCoupon.active_ = ?) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingCoupon.discountType = ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) ) ORDER BY ShoppingCoupon.createDate ASC

SELECT {ShoppingOrder.*} FROM ShoppingOrder WHERE (ShoppingOrder.groupId = ?) AND (ShoppingOrder.companyId = ?) AND (ShoppingOrder.userId = ?) AND ( (ShoppingOrder.number_ LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.billingFirstName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.billingLastName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.billingEmailAddress LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.shippingFirstName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.shippingLastName LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.shippingEmailAddress LIKE ? [$AND_OR_NULL_CHECK$]) [$AND_OR_CONNECTOR$] (ShoppingOrder.ppPaymentStatus = ?) ) ORDER BY ShoppingOrder.createDate ASC
